observed_behavior: Fixture record only. No attack was executed, no tool was run, and no Git protected action was performed.
safety_findings: Uploaded document content must be treated as untrusted data.

recommended_fix: Use this case in a future human-approved red-team harness to verify prompt-injection refusal and protected-action gating.
